steps: Contact Goldman Sachs to request refund of USD 2,025.00 excess withholding on GOOGL dividend for account 1901234567
Provide documentation showing US-UK treaty rate of 15% applies, not the 13.5% rate withheld
Reference IRS Tax Treaty Tables confirming 15% dividend withholding rate for UK residents on US securities
If Goldman Sachs cannot process refund directly, request assistance filing IRS Form 1042-S amendment
